rationale: The PR exactly fulfills the strict v12 Task 4a requirements. The Clotho inventory defines exactly the required frozen arrays, the normative REQUIRED_INVENTORY_IDS table, and the LOADER_CAPABLE_BUILTIN_SAFE_EXPORTS mapping, all heavily frozen and unit-tested for deep equality. The single shared D33 module-load form classifier and resolver are robustly implemented in `util.mjs` and utilized by `test-closure.mjs` to rigorously prove the `git` and `code` closures exactly equal their committed inventories without runtime discovery. The `git` weaver strictly adheres to its path-scoped git wrapper shape, extracting `introduced-by` deterministically. The `code` weaver faithfully implements all four `depends-on` endpoint shapes, properly handling `repository-file` mappings when exports are missing, dedup, and conservatively omitting unused imports. The counted source iterator respects D26/D29 accounting. Zero external dependencies, pure ESM, and scoped tests provide high confidence in the implementation.
